title: Set up Aeneas/Charon to Lean4 verification infrastructure
description:
- Install Aeneas/Charon as external dev toolchain (not cargo dep)
- Create `proofs/` directory: `lakefile.lean`, `lean-toolchain`, Mathlib dependency
- Run Charon extraction: `charon --crate gf2-core` → LLBC JSON
- Run Aeneas translation: `aeneas --backend lean` → `proofs/GF2Core/*.lean`
- Verify translation succeeds for `gfp/` and `gfpn/` modules
- Document any const-generic or trait workarounds needed
- Add CI job: `charon && aeneas && lake build`
- **Risk gate**: If Charon cannot handle `Fp<const P: u64>`, document the blocker and fall back to monomorphized wrappers for specific primes

**Success criteria**: `lake build` compiles the auto-generated Lean code without errors
